CTS_WF_CHEQUE_RECEIVED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} received from {bank} — queued for processing.

CTS_WF_CHEQUE_DUPLICATE.text: Duplicate instrument {instrument_id} rejected — already processed in session {session_id}.

CTS_WF_CHEQUE_STALE.text: Instrument {instrument_id} is stale — presentation date {presented_date} exceeds validity window.

CTS_WF_OCR_LOW_CONFIDENCE.text: OCR confidence {confidence_pct}% below threshold for {instrument_id} — routed to human review.

CTS_WF_OCR_AMOUNT_MISMATCH.text: Amount mismatch on {instrument_id} — figures say {amount_figures}, words say {amount_words}.

CTS_WF_OCR_MICR_INVALID.text: MICR line unreadable on {instrument_id} — routed to human review.

CTS_WF_OCR_PAYEE_BLANK.text: Payee name blank on {instrument_id} — routed to human review.

CTS_WF_ALTERATION_DETECTED.text: Alteration detected on {instrument_id} — field: {field}. Routed to human review.

CTS_WF_ALTERATION_SUSPECTED.text: Possible alteration on {instrument_id} — field: {field}, confidence {confidence_pct}%. Routed to human review.

CTS_WF_SIGNATURE_VERIFIED.text: Signature verified for {account_display} on {instrument_id} — match score {score_pct}%.

CTS_WF_SIGNATURE_MISMATCH.text: Signature mismatch for {account_display} — {instrument_id} score {score_pct}%, below threshold. Human review.

CTS_WF_VAULT_MISS.text: No signature specimen for {account_display} — {instrument_id} routed to human review.

CTS_WF_VAULT_STALE_ROUTING.text: Signature vault stale — {instrument_id} routed to human review as a precaution.

CTS_WF_PPS_MATCH.text: PPS record matched for {account_display} — {instrument_id} amount and series confirmed.

CTS_WF_PPS_MISS.text: No PPS record for {account_display} cheque {instrument_id} — routed to human review.

CTS_WF_PPS_AMOUNT_MISMATCH.text: PPS amount mismatch on {instrument_id} — registered {expected_range}, presented {presented_range}.

CTS_WF_PPS_SERIES_MISMATCH.text: PPS cheque series mismatch on {instrument_id} — series {presented_series} not registered.

CTS_WF_CBS_BALANCE_SUFFICIENT.text: Balance check passed for {account_display} — {instrument_id} cleared to proceed.

CTS_WF_CBS_BALANCE_INSUFFICIENT.text: Insufficient balance for {account_display} — {instrument_id} to be returned.

CTS_WF_CBS_ACCOUNT_DORMANT.text: Account {account_display} is dormant — {instrument_id} routed to human review.

CTS_WF_CBS_UNREACHABLE_DEGRADED.text: CBS unreachable — {instrument_id} proceeding on image-only path. Balance check deferred.

CTS_WF_STOP_PAYMENT_HIT.text: Stop payment instruction active for {instrument_id} on {account_display} — returned immediately.

CTS_WF_FRAUD_SCORE_LOW.text: Fraud score {score} (low risk) for {instrument_id} — STP path eligible.

CTS_WF_FRAUD_SCORE_HIGH.text: Fraud score {score} exceeds threshold for {instrument_id} — routed to human review.

CTS_WF_FRAUD_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE.text: Fraud model unavailable for {instrument_id} — routed to human review as precaution.

CTS_WF_FRAUD_HIGH_VALUE.text: High-value cheque {instrument_id} ({amount_range}) — mandatory human review regardless of score.

CTS_WF_FRAUD_SHAP_STORED.text: SHAP explanation computed and stored for {instrument_id} — top factor: {top_factor}.

CTS_WF_STP_CONFIRMED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} auto-confirmed via STP — filed to NGCH.

CTS_WF_STP_BLOCKED_OPA.text: STP blocked for {instrument_id} by policy {policy_name} — routed to human review.

CTS_WF_HUMAN_REVIEW_QUEUED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} routed to human review — {rationale}. Awaiting reviewer assignment.

CTS_WF_HUMAN_CONFIRMED.text: Reviewer {reviewer} confirmed cheque {instrument_id} — filed to NGCH.

CTS_WF_REVIEW_TIMEOUT.text: Human review timed out for {instrument_id} after {elapsed_minutes} minutes — auto-returned.

CTS_WF_REVIEW_IET_WARNING.text: IET warning for {instrument_id} in review queue — {minutes_remaining} minutes remaining.

CTS_WF_IET_WATCHDOG_FIRED.text: IET watchdog triggered for {instrument_id} — emergency filing initiated with {seconds_remaining}s remaining.

CTS_WF_IET_SAFE.text: IET watchdog closed safely for {instrument_id} — filed within window.

CTS_KS_ENGAGED.text: Vision AI kill switch engaged — mode={mode} scope={scope} bank={bank_id} by {activated_by}. All affected instruments routed to human review.

CTS_KS_RELEASED.text: Vision AI kill switch released — mode={mode} scope={scope} bank={bank_id} by {released_by}. Normal AI processing resumed.

CTS_KS_APPLIED_KC.text: Kill Complete (KC) applied to {instrument_id} — Vision AI bypassed. Instrument queued for human review. Scope: {scope}. Bank: {bank_id}.

CTS_KS_APPLIED_KP.text: Kill Partial (KP) applied to {instrument_id} — Vision AI ran but STP suppressed. Instrument queued for human review. Scope: {scope}. Bank: {bank_id}.

CTS_KS_BACKSTOP_TRIGGERED.text: Kill-switch backstop triggered at decision stage for {instrument_id} — mode={kill_switch_mode} scope={scope} bank={bank_id}. Mid-flight instrument intercepted before STP.

CTS_OUT_SCANNER_JAM.text: Paper jam on {scanner_id} — last captured instrument was {instrument_id}.

CTS_OUT_IMAGE_CAPTURED.text: Front and rear images captured for {instrument_id} — quality score {quality_pct}%.

CTS_OUT_IMAGE_QUALITY_FAIL.text: Image quality below threshold for {instrument_id} — score {quality_pct}%. Rescan required.

CTS_OUT_IMAGE_SKEW_HIGH.text: Excessive skew detected on {instrument_id} — {skew_degrees}°. Rescan recommended.

CTS_OUT_MICR_EXTRACTED.text: MICR line extracted for {instrument_id} — IFSC {drawee_ifsc}, account {account_display}.

CTS_OUT_MICR_UNREADABLE.text: MICR line unreadable on {instrument_id} — manual entry required.

CTS_OUT_CTS2010_PASS.text: CTS-2010 compliance check passed for outward {instrument_id}.

CTS_OUT_CTS2010_FAIL.text: CTS-2010 compliance failed for outward {instrument_id} — {violation_count} violations: {violations}.

CTS_OUT_CTS2010_NON_CTS_FORM.text: Non-CTS cheque form detected for {instrument_id} — not eligible for truncation.

CTS_OUT_LOT_CREATED.text: Lot {lot_id} created for clearing zone {zone} — {instrument_count} instruments.

CTS_OUT_LOT_INSTRUMENT_ADDED.text: Instrument {instrument_id} added to lot {lot_id} — lot total: {lot_total}.

CTS_OUT_INSTRUMENT_PENDING.text: Instrument {instrument_id} (scan {scan_id}) accepted — awaiting lot assignment at clearing session open.

CTS_OUT_LOT_SEAL_FAILED.text: Lot {lot_id} seal failed — {reason}. Resolve before submission.

CTS_OUT_LOT_INSTRUMENT_REMOVED.text: Instrument {instrument_id} removed from lot {lot_id} by {operator} — reason: {reason}.

CTS_OUT_ENDORSEMENT_STAMPED.text: Endorsement stamp applied to {instrument_id} — stamp ref {stamp_ref}.

CTS_OUT_ENDORSED.text: Lot {lot_number} for bank {bank_id} endorsed — {endorsed_count} instruments stamped.

CTS_OUT_NGCH_FILE_BUILT.text: NGCH presentation file built for lot {lot_id} — {instrument_count} instruments.

CTS_OUT_NGCH_SUBMISSION_FAILED.text: NGCH outward submission failed for lot {lot_id} — error {error_code}. Retrying.

CTS_OUT_NGCH_SESSION_CUTOFF_MISSED.text: Lot {lot_id} missed clearing session cutoff {cutoff_time} — deferred to next session.

CTS_OUT_RRF_GENERATED.text: Return Reason File generated for session {session_id} — {return_count} returns.

CTS_OUT_RECONCILIATION_EXCEPTION.text: Reconciliation exception on {instrument_id} — NGCH status {ngch_status} vs local {local_status}.

CTS_OUT_REPRESENTATION_PENDING.text: Instrument {instrument_id} returned (code {return_reason_code}) — fix issue and re-present within {representation_window_hours} hours.

CTS_OUT_REPRESENTATION_EXPIRED.text: Re-presentation window expired for {instrument_id} (code {return_reason_code}) — {representation_window_hours}-hour limit breached. Manual action required.

CTS_OUT_REPRESENTATION_FAILED.text: Re-presentation to NGCH failed for {instrument_id} (code {return_reason_code}). Ops intervention required.

CTS_OUT_MISMATCH_HELD.text: Instrument {instrument_id} held at branch {branch_id} — scanner vs Vision mismatch on: {mismatch_fields}. Awaiting branch review.

CTS_OUT_MISMATCH_RESOLVED_GO_AHEAD.text: Branch mismatch on {instrument_id} at {branch_id} resolved as GO_AHEAD by {reviewer} — proceeding to lot.

CTS_OUT_MISMATCH_RESOLVED_REJECTED.text: Branch mismatch on {instrument_id} at {branch_id} rejected by {reviewer} — instrument withdrawn.

CTS_OUT_MISMATCH_TIMEOUT_AUTO_REJECTED.text: Mismatch hold on {instrument_id} at branch {branch_id} expired after {timeout_hours}h without resolution — auto-rejected.

CTS_COMP_BANK_LOGO_MISSING.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: bank logo absent or non-UV-reactive.

CTS_COMP_WATERMARK_MISSING.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: CTS-INDIA watermark absent.

CTS_COMP_VOID_PANTOGRAPH_MISSING.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: VOID pantograph not present.

CTS_COMP_IFSC_MISSING.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: IFSC code absent or unreadable.

CTS_COMP_MICR_BAND_INVALID.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: MICR band position or dimensions non-compliant.

CTS_COMP_IMAGE_RESOLUTION_LOW.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: image resolution {actual_dpi} DPI below required 200 DPI.

CTS_COMP_IMAGE_COLOUR_INVALID.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: front image must be colour (24-bit), rear greyscale.

CTS_COMP_INSTRUMENT_SIZE_INVALID.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: physical dimensions {actual_dimensions} outside standard range.

CTS_COMP_POST_DATED.text: Instrument {instrument_id} is post-dated — cheque date {cheque_date} is in the future.

CTS_COMP_STALE_DATED.text: Instrument {instrument_id} stale — cheque date {cheque_date} exceeds {validity_days}-day validity.

CTS_COMP_AMOUNT_WORDS_BLANK.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: amount in words is blank.

CTS_COMP_PAYEE_BLANK.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: payee name is blank.

CTS_COMP_DRAWEE_BANK_MISMATCH.text: CTS-2010 violation on {instrument_id}: drawee IFSC {micr_ifsc} does not match image bank {image_bank}.

CTS_COMP_EXCESSIVE_DAMAGE.text: Instrument {instrument_id} rejected — physical damage exceeds acceptable threshold for truncation.

CTS_NGCH_FILED_CONFIRM.text: Cheque {instrument_id} CONFIRMED and filed to NGCH — reference {ngch_ref}.

CTS_NGCH_FILED_RETURN.text: Cheque {instrument_id} RETURNED and filed to NGCH — reason: {return_reason}, ref {ngch_ref}.

CTS_NGCH_SUBMIT_FAILED.text: NGCH submission failed for {instrument_id} — error {error_code}. Attempt {attempt} of {max_attempts}.

CTS_NGCH_SUBMIT_FAILED_TERMINAL.text: NGCH submission permanently failed for {instrument_id} after {max_attempts} attempts — manual intervention required.

CTS_NGCH_DUPLICATE_DETECTED.text: Duplicate NGCH filing detected for {instrument_id} — idempotency key matched. Skipped safely.

CTS_NGCH_IET_EXPIRED.text: IET window expired for {instrument_id} — deemed approval in effect. Bank is liable.

CTS_NGCH_MAINTENANCE_WINDOW.text: NGCH in maintenance — {instrument_id} queued for filing on reconnect. IET watchdog active.

CTS_NGCH_RATE_LIMITED.text: NGCH rate limit hit — {pending_count} instruments queued. Retry after {retry_after_seconds}s.

CTS_NGCH_AUTH_CERT_EXPIRED.text: NGCH mTLS certificate expired for {bank_id} — renewing from Vault. Filings paused.

CTS_NGCH_AUTH_CERT_RENEWED.text: NGCH mTLS certificate renewed for {bank_id} — filings resumed.

CTS_NGCH_TRANSPORT_SWITCHED.text: NGCH transport switched from {old_transport} to {new_transport} for {bank_id}.

CTS_NGCH_SETTLEMENT_REPORT_RECEIVED.text: NGCH settlement report received for session {session_id} — {total_items} items, value {total_value_range}.

CTS_SMB_INSTRUMENT_RECEIVED.text: Inward instrument {instrument_id} received from sub-member {smb_name} ({smb_ifsc}) via sponsor {sponsor_ifsc}.

CTS_SMB_INSTRUMENT_VALIDATED.text: Sub-member instrument {instrument_id} passed sponsor bank validation.

CTS_SMB_ROUTED_TO_SPONSOR_LOT.text: Sub-member instrument {instrument_id} routed to sponsor lot {lot_id} for NGCH submission.

CTS_SMB_FORWARDED_TO_NGCH.text: Sub-member instrument {instrument_id} forwarded to NGCH under sponsor {sponsor_ifsc}.

CTS_SMB_RISK_SHIELD_TRIGGERED.text: Risk shield triggered for {smb_name} — {instrument_id} held pending review. Trigger: {trigger}.

CTS_SMB_RISK_SHIELD_CLEARED.text: Risk shield cleared for {instrument_id} from {smb_name} — processing resumed.

CTS_SMB_DAILY_LIMIT_APPROACHING.text: Sub-member {smb_name} at {usage_pct}% of daily submission limit.

CTS_SMB_DAILY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.text: Sub-member {smb_name} has exceeded daily submission limit — further instruments held.

CTS_SMB_SMB_OFFLINE.text: Sub-member {smb_name} ({smb_ifsc}) has not submitted in {hours_since}h — connectivity check advised.

CTS_SMB_NOTIFICATION_SENT.text: Return notification sent to {smb_name} for {return_count} returned instruments from session {session_id}.

CTS_SMB_HUMAN_REVIEW_ASSIGNED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} for {smb_name} assigned to SMB review queue — reason: {reason}. Sponsor bank: {sponsor_bank}. IET deadline: {iet_deadline}.

CTS_SMB_DECISION_FILED.text: SMB review decision filed for {instrument_id} ({smb_name}): {decision} by {filed_by}.

CTS_SMB_SETTLEMENT_AVAILABLE.text: Settlement report available for {smb_name} — session {session_id}: {instrument_count} instruments settled on {settlement_date}.

CBS_BALANCE_INSUFFICIENT.text: Insufficient balance for {account_display} — {instrument_id} cannot be honoured.

CBS_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.text: Account {account_display} not found in CBS {cbs_type} — {instrument_id} to human review.

CBS_ACCOUNT_FROZEN.text: Account {account_display} is frozen in CBS — {instrument_id} returned immediately.

CBS_ACCOUNT_CLOSED.text: Account {account_display} is closed in CBS — {instrument_id} returned immediately.

CBS_ACCOUNT_DORMANT.text: Account {account_display} is dormant in CBS — {instrument_id} routed to human review.

CBS_ACCOUNT_LIEN_MARKED.text: Lien marked on {account_display} — {instrument_id} routed to human review for manual balance verification.

CBS_STOP_PAYMENT_ACTIVE.text: Stop payment instruction active for {instrument_id} on {account_display} — returned immediately.

CBS_STOP_PAYMENT_CLEAR.text: No stop payment on record for {instrument_id} / {account_display}.

CBS_UNREACHABLE.text: CBS {cbs_type} unreachable for {bank_id} — timeout after {timeout_seconds}s. Degraded path active.

CBS_RECOVERED.text: CBS {cbs_type} connection restored for {bank_id} after {downtime_minutes} minutes.

CBS_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT.text: CBS {cbs_type} response timeout for {bank_id} on query type {query_type} — attempt {attempt}.

CBS_AUTH_FAILED.text: CBS {cbs_type} authentication failure for {bank_id} — credentials may be stale.

CBS_VAULT_SYNC_STARTED.text: CBS vault sync started for {bank_id} — fetching signatures and PPS from {cbs_type}.

CBS_VAULT_SYNC_COMPLETE.text: CBS vault sync complete for {bank_id} — {sig_count} signatures, {pps_count} PPS entries loaded.

CBS_VAULT_SYNC_FAILED.text: CBS vault sync failed for {bank_id} — error: {error_code}. Retaining existing vault data.

CBS_VAULT_PARTIAL_SYNC.text: CBS vault partial sync for {bank_id} — {loaded_count} of {total_count} accounts synced. {failed_count} failures.

VAULT_SIG_HIT.text: Signature vault hit for {account_display} — specimen found, verification proceeding.

VAULT_SIG_MISS.text: Signature vault miss for {account_display} — no specimen on record. {instrument_id} to human review.

VAULT_SIG_STALE.text: Signature vault stale for {bank_id} — last sync {hours_ago}h ago. All inward cheques to human review.

VAULT_SIG_LOAD_COMPLETE.text: Signature vault loaded for {bank_id} — {count} specimens ready.

VAULT_SIG_LOAD_FAILED.text: Signature vault load failed for {bank_id} — {error}. Existing data retained.

VAULT_SIG_SPECIMEN_UPDATED.text: Signature specimen updated for {account_display} by vault sync — previous version archived.

VAULT_SIG_SPECIMEN_REVOKED.text: Signature specimen revoked for {account_display} — subsequent cheques will route to human review.

VAULT_SIG_INTEGRITY_FAIL.text: Signature vault integrity check failed for {bank_id} — {corrupt_count} entries corrupted. Resync required.

VAULT_SIG_CBS_FALLBACK.text: Vault miss for {account_display} — CBS fallback triggered for {instrument_id}. {specimen_count} specimen(s) fetched and stored.

VAULT_SIG_CBS_STORED.text: CBS specimen(s) stored in signature vault for {account_display} — {specimen_count} image(s) written.

VAULT_SIG_NO_SPECIMEN.text: No signature specimen for {account_display} — vault miss and CBS returned nothing. {instrument_id} to human review.

VAULT_SIG_MULTI_DETECTED.text: Multiple signatures detected on {instrument_id} for {account_display} — {sig_count} ink marks found. Human review required.

VAULT_PPS_HIT.text: PPS vault hit for {account_display} — cheque series {cheque_series} registered.

VAULT_PPS_MISS.text: No PPS record for {account_display} / {instrument_id} — routed to human review.

VAULT_PPS_AMOUNT_MISMATCH.text: PPS amount mismatch on {instrument_id} — registered {expected_range}, presented {presented_range}.

VAULT_PPS_SERIES_MISMATCH.text: PPS series mismatch on {instrument_id} — presented series {presented_series} not registered.

VAULT_PPS_PAYEE_MISMATCH.text: PPS payee mismatch on {instrument_id} — registered payee differs from instrument.

VAULT_PPS_LOAD_COMPLETE.text: PPS vault loaded for {bank_id} — {count} entries ready.

VAULT_PPS_LOAD_FAILED.text: PPS vault load failed for {bank_id} — {error}. Existing data retained.

VAULT_PPS_ENTRY_EXPIRED.text: PPS entry expired for {account_display} cheque series {cheque_series} — no longer valid.

VAULT_SYNC_COMPLETE.text: Vault sync complete for {bank_id} — signatures: {sig_count}, PPS entries: {pps_count}.

VAULT_SYNC_FAILED.text: Vault sync failed for {bank_id} — error: {error_code}. Retaining existing vault data.

AUTH_LOGIN_FAILED.text: Login failed for {username} — invalid credentials. Attempt {attempt} of {max_attempts}.

AUTH_ACCOUNT_LOCKED.text: Account {username} locked after {max_attempts} failed login attempts. Unlock required.

AUTH_SESSION_STARTED.text: Session started for {display_name} — session ID {session_display}, expires {expires_at}.

AUTH_SESSION_EXPIRED.text: Session expired for {display_name} — please sign in again.

AUTH_SESSION_REVOKED.text: Session forcibly revoked for {display_name} by {revoked_by} — reason: {reason}.

AUTH_TOTP_FAILED.text: TOTP verification failed for {display_name} — code invalid or expired.

AUTH_TOTP_BYPASS_USED.text: TOTP backup code used by {display_name} — remaining backup codes: {remaining_count}.

AUTH_SAML_ASSERTION_VALID.text: SAML assertion validated for {username} from IdP {idp_entity_id}.

AUTH_SAML_ASSERTION_INVALID.text: SAML assertion invalid for {username} — {error}. Login denied.

AUTH_SAML_IDP_UNREACHABLE.text: Bank IdP {idp_entity_id} unreachable — login blocked. Check IdP connectivity.

AUTH_ZONE_ACCESS_DENIED.text: Zone access denied — {display_name} ({role}) not authorised for clearing zone {zone}.

AUTH_ROLE_CHANGED.text: Role changed for {target_user} from {old_role} to {new_role} by {changed_by}.

AUTH_ZONE_SCOPE_CHANGED.text: Clearing zone scope updated for {target_user} — zones: {new_zones} (changed by {changed_by}).

AUTH_USER_UPDATED.text: User profile updated for {display_name} by {updated_by} — fields: {changed_fields}.

AUTH_RBI_ACCESS_GRANTED.text: RBI examiner access granted for {examiner_name} — scope: {scope}, valid until {valid_until}.

AUTH_RBI_ACCESS_EXPIRED.text: RBI examiner access expired for {examiner_name} — {access_duration} day engagement closed.

EJ_LOG_INGESTED.text: EJ log received from ATM {atm_id} — {transaction_count} transactions, {size_kb}KB.

EJ_LOG_DUPLICATE.text: Duplicate EJ log rejected from ATM {atm_id} — hash {file_hash} already ingested.

EJ_LOG_CORRUPT.text: Corrupt EJ log from ATM {atm_id} — AES-GCM integrity check failed.

EJ_EDGE_BUFFER_HIGH.text: Edge buffer for ATM {atm_id} at {buffer_pct}% capacity — central connectivity may be degraded.

EJ_EDGE_BUFFER_FULL.text: Edge buffer full for ATM {atm_id} — oldest logs being overwritten. Immediate connectivity check required.

EJ_OEM_DETECTED.text: OEM fingerprint detected for ATM {atm_id} — manufacturer: {oem}, format version: {format_version}.

EJ_OEM_UNKNOWN.text: Unknown OEM format from ATM {atm_id} — fingerprint score {score}. Manual OEM classification required.

EJ_OEM_FORMAT_CHANGED.text: OEM format change detected on ATM {atm_id} — was {old_format}, now {new_format}. Parser may need update.

EJ_PARSE_COMPLETE.text: EJ normalisation complete for ATM {atm_id} — {parsed_count} records extracted.

EJ_PARSE_LOW_CONFIDENCE.text: EJ low-confidence extraction for ATM {atm_id} — {low_count} of {total_count} fields below threshold.

EJ_PARSE_FAILED.text: EJ parsing failed for ATM {atm_id} — {failed_count} records could not be normalised.

EJ_PARSE_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE.text: LLM unavailable for EJ parsing — ATM {atm_id} log queued for retry.

EJ_CANONICAL_STORED.text: EJ canonical record stored for ATM {atm_id} — hash {canonical_hash}, {record_count} transactions.

EJ_SCHEMA_VALID.text: EJ canonical schema validation passed for ATM {atm_id} — all required fields present.

EJ_SCHEMA_INVALID.text: EJ canonical schema validation failed for ATM {atm_id} — missing fields: {missing_fields}.

EJ_DISPUTE_RECEIVED.text: Dispute claim {claim_id} received from {source} for ATM {atm_id} — amount {amount_range}.

EJ_DISPUTE_MATCHED.text: Dispute {claim_id} matched to EJ record for ATM {atm_id} — confidence {confidence_pct}%.

EJ_DISPUTE_NO_MATCH.text: Dispute {claim_id} for ATM {atm_id} — no EJ record match found. Escalated for manual review.

EJ_DISPUTE_ESCALATED.text: Dispute {claim_id} escalated to human review — reason: {escalation_reason}.

EJ_DISPUTE_CCTV_REQUESTED.text: CCTV evidence requested for dispute {claim_id} — ATM {atm_id}, window {time_window}.

EJ_DISPUTE_CCTV_RETRIEVED.text: CCTV clip retrieved for dispute {claim_id} — {clip_duration}s clip stored at {object_key}.

EJ_DISPUTE_CCTV_UNAVAILABLE.text: CCTV unavailable for dispute {claim_id} — ATM {atm_id} camera {camera_id} offline or clip overwritten.

EJ_ATM_HEALTH_HEALTHY.text: ATM {atm_id} health check passed — all metrics within normal range.

EJ_ATM_HEALTH_DEGRADED.text: ATM {atm_id} health degraded — {anomaly_type} detected. Predictive alert issued.

EJ_ATM_HEALTH_CRITICAL.text: ATM {atm_id} in critical state — {fault_description}. Immediate attention required.

EJ_ATM_CASH_LOW.text: ATM {atm_id} cash level low — {remaining_notes} notes remaining across {denomination_count} denominations.

EJ_ATM_DISPENSE_FAILURE_RATE_HIGH.text: ATM {atm_id} dispense failure rate at {failure_rate_pct}% over last {window_hours}h — hardware check recommended.

EJ_ATM_OFFLINE.text: ATM {atm_id} has been offline for {offline_hours}h — last log received {last_log_time}.

EJ_ATM_PREDICTED_FAILURE.text: Predictive model indicates ATM {atm_id} may fail within {predicted_hours}h — maintenance recommended.

PLATFORM_CONFIG_CHANGE_SUBMITTED.text: Config change submitted by {submitted_by} — key: {config_key}, new value: {new_value}. Pending approval.

PLATFORM_CONFIG_CHANGE_APPROVED.text: Config change approved by {approved_by} — {config_key} updated from {old_value} to {new_value}.

PLATFORM_CONFIG_HOT_RELOADED.text: Config hot-reload triggered for {bank_id} — {key_count} keys updated from Kafka event.

PLATFORM_POLICY_SUBMITTED.text: OPA policy {policy_name} v{version} submitted by {submitted_by} — pending approval.

PLATFORM_POLICY_APPROVED.text: OPA policy {policy_name} v{version} approved by {approved_by} — hot-reload initiated.

PLATFORM_POLICY_RELOADED.text: OPA policy {policy_name} v{version} live — all subsequent decisions use new policy.

PLATFORM_POLICY_RELOAD_FAILED.text: OPA policy {policy_name} v{version} reload failed — {error}. Previous version retained.

PLATFORM_CBS_UNREACHABLE.text: CBS {cbs_type} unreachable for {bank_id} — degraded mode active. Balance checks deferred.

PLATFORM_CBS_RECOVERED.text: CBS {cbs_type} restored for {bank_id} after {downtime_minutes} minutes — normal processing resumed.

PLATFORM_AUDIT_WRITE_FAILED.text: Immudb write failed for event {event_type} on {instrument_id} — retrying (attempt {attempt}).

PLATFORM_AUDIT_TAMPER_DETECTED.text: Immudb Merkle tree inconsistency detected in collection {collection} — security team notified.

PLATFORM_AUDIT_INTEGRITY_VERIFIED.text: Immudb integrity check passed for {collection} — {entry_count} entries verified.

PLATFORM_MODEL_DRIFT_WARN.text: Model {model_name} drift warning — {metric} dropped {drop_pct}% over {window_days} days.

PLATFORM_MODEL_DRIFT_CRITICAL.text: Model {model_name} drift critical — {metric} dropped {drop_pct}%, exceeding {threshold_pct}% threshold. Auto-tightening.

PLATFORM_MODEL_PULLED.text: Model {model_name} pulled from production — {metric} degraded beyond safe threshold. Human review mandatory.

PLATFORM_DC_FAILOVER.text: DC failover triggered — {failed_dc} offline, {active_dc} handling 100% traffic.

PLATFORM_DC_RESTORED.text: DC {restored_dc} back online — active-active rebalancing in progress.

PLATFORM_VAULT_TOKEN_EXPIRING.text: HashiCorp Vault token expiring in {minutes_remaining} minutes for service {service_name}.

PLATFORM_VAULT_TOKEN_RENEWED.text: HashiCorp Vault token renewed for {service_name} — valid for {valid_hours}h.

PLATFORM_KAFKA_LAG_HIGH.text: Kafka consumer lag high on topic {topic} — lag {lag_count}, consumer group {consumer_group}.

PLATFORM_SCALING_EVENT.text: KEDA scaling event — {service_name} scaled from {from_pods} to {to_pods} pods. Trigger: {trigger}.

VAULT_STALE.text: Vault data stale for {bank_id} ({vault_type}) — {staleness_minutes} minutes since last sync. All instruments routing to human review.

VAULT_INTEGRITY_FAIL.text: Vault integrity check FAILED for {bank_id} ({vault_type}) — {error_detail}. Vault halted, all instruments routed to human review.

CTS_REVIEW_TIMEOUT.text: Human review timed out for cheque {instrument_id} ({bank_id}) after {elapsed_minutes} min — auto-returned to NGCH.

CTS_REVIEW_ASSIGNED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} ({bank_id}) assigned to reviewer {reviewer_display} for human review.

CTS_NGCH_TERMINAL_FAILURE.text: NGCH filing FAILED terminally for cheque {instrument_id} ({bank_id}) — error {error_code} after {retry_count} retries. Manual intervention required.

CTS_NGCH_CERT_EXPIRED.text: NGCH mTLS certificate expired for {bank_id} (expired {cert_expiry}). All NGCH filing halted — rotate certificate immediately.

MCP_CONN_CREATED.text: MCP connection {connection_type} created for {bank_id} (SMB: {smb_id}) by {created_by}. Status: PENDING — test required before clearing can open.

MCP_CONN_UPDATED.text: MCP connection {connection_type} ({connection_id}) updated by {updated_by} for {bank_id}. Status reset to PENDING — re-test required.

MCP_CONN_DELETED.text: MCP connection {connection_type} ({connection_id}) deleted by {deleted_by} for {bank_id} (SMB: {smb_id}). Clearing sessions blocked if no replacement configured.

MCP_CONN_TESTED_OK.text: MCP connection {connection_type} ({connection_id}) tested OK for {bank_id} — latency {latency_ms} ms. Status: ACTIVE. Tested by {tested_by}.

MCP_CONN_TESTED_FAIL.text: MCP connection {connection_type} ({connection_id}) test FAILED for {bank_id} — {error}. Status: ERROR. Clearing sessions will be blocked. Tested by {tested_by}.

MCP_CONN_SYNC_TRIGGERED.text: Vault sync triggered for MCP connection {connection_type} ({connection_id}) on {bank_id} — workflow {workflow_id}. Triggered by {triggered_by}.

CTS_CC_SESSION_OPENED.text: Clearing session {session_id} ({session_type}) opened for agency {agency_id} → SB {sb_bank_id} on {clearing_date}. Awaiting lot sealing from all PUs.

CTS_CC_SESSION_SEALED.text: All {lot_count} lots sealed for session {session_id} — {total_instruments} instruments ready for submission to SB {sb_bank_id}. Agency: {agency_id}.

CTS_CC_SB_SUBMITTED.text: Lot package submitted to SB {sb_bank_id} via {connector_type} — reference {sb_reference}. Session: {session_id}, instruments: {instrument_count}. Agency: {agency_id}.

CTS_CC_SB_ACKNOWLEDGED.text: SB {sb_bank_id} acknowledged receipt of session {session_id} — reference {sb_reference}. Agency: {agency_id}.

CTS_CC_INWARD_RECEIVED.text: Inward relay received from SB {sb_bank_id} — {instrument_count} instruments for session {session_id}. Routing to PUs. Agency: {agency_id}.

CTS_CC_INWARD_ROUTED.text: Inward routing complete for session {session_id} — {routed_count} instruments routed to PUs, {failed_count} CRL misses. Agency: {agency_id}.

CTS_CC_SB_CONN_FAILED.text: SB connector failure for {sb_bank_id} [{connector_type}] — {error_code}. Session {session_id} could not be submitted. Manual intervention required. Agency: {agency_id}.

CTS_CC_SESSION_RECONCILED.text: Clearing session {session_id} fully reconciled — {instrument_count} instruments settled with SB {sb_bank_id} on {clearing_date}. Agency: {agency_id}.

CTS_SMB_PUSH_RECEIVED.text: CBS push file received from SMB {smb_id} — type {file_type}. Agency: {agency_id}. Hash: {file_hash}.

CTS_SMB_PUSH_VAULT_UPDATED.text: Vault updated from SMB {smb_id} CBS push — {records_processed} {file_type} records applied. Agency: {agency_id}.

CTS_SMB_PUSH_PARSE_FAILED.text: SMB {smb_id} CBS push file parse failed — {file_type}: {failure_reason}. Agency: {agency_id}. Resend required.

CTS_SMB_PUSH_DUPLICATE.text: Duplicate CBS push file from SMB {smb_id} — {file_type} already processed (hash {file_hash}). Agency: {agency_id}. Skipped.

AUTH_LDAP_BIND_SUCCESS.text: LDAP authentication successful for {username} ({entity_type}) at bank {bank_id}.

AUTH_LDAP_BIND_FAILED.text: LDAP authentication failed for {username} ({entity_type}) at bank {bank_id}. Invalid credentials.

AUTH_LDAP_GROUP_UNMAPPED.text: User {username} authenticated via LDAP at bank {bank_id} but has no mapped ASTRA role. AD groups: {groups}. Add group to group_role_map.

AUTH_LDAP_SERVER_UNREACHABLE.text: LDAP/AD server {server_url} unreachable for {entity_type} auth at bank {bank_id}. Users cannot log in. Check network and LDAPS port 636.

AUTH_LOCAL_LOGIN_SUCCESS.text: Local account login successful for {username} ({entity_type}) at bank {bank_id}.

AUTH_LOCAL_LOGIN_FAILED.text: Local account login failed for {username} at bank {bank_id}. Failed attempts: {attempts}.

AUTH_LOCAL_ACCOUNT_LOCKED.text: Local account {username} at bank {bank_id} locked until {locked_until} after repeated failures. Contact bank IT admin.

AUTH_CONNECTOR_CONFIG_MISSING.text: Auth connector configuration missing for {entity_type} at bank {bank_id}. Users cannot log in. Update Helm Layer 2 values.

MSV_VALIDATED.text: MSV validation complete for instrument {instrument_id} at bank {bank_id}: outcome {outcome}, confidence {confidence_pct}%.

MSV_VALIDATION_DEGRADED.text: MSV validation degraded for instrument {instrument_id} at bank {bank_id}: {reason_code}. Routing to human review.

MSV_ENROLLMENT_COMPLETE.text: MSV bulk enrollment job {job_id} complete at bank {bank_id}: {enrolled_count}/{total_count} accounts enrolled.

MSV_ENROLLMENT_FAILED.text: MSV enrollment job {job_id} failed at bank {bank_id}: {error_summary}. Retry required.

MSV_ENROLLMENT_SKIPPED.text: MSV enrollment skipped for account {account_display} at bank {bank_id}: {reason_code}.

MSV_CBS_SYNC_COMPLETE.text: MSV CBS sync complete for bank {bank_id} batch {batch_id}: {enrolled_count} signatories enrolled.

MSV_CBS_SYNC_DEGRADED.text: MSV CBS sync degraded for bank {bank_id} batch {batch_id}. CBS unavailable — will retry on next sync cycle.

MSV_SIGNATORY_REVOKED.text: MSV signatory {signatory_id} revoked for account {account_display} at bank {bank_id}.

CTS_WF_CHEQUE_POSTDATED.text: Instrument {instrument_id} is post-dated (cheque date: {cheque_date}) — returned immediately (URRBCH code 30).

CTS_WF_CHEQUE_UNDATED.text: Instrument {instrument_id} has no date — returned immediately (URRBCH code 32).

CTS_WF_ALTERATION_CTS_CODE85.text: CTS-2010 alteration in non-date fields on {instrument_id} — fields: {altered_fields}. Auto-returned (URRBCH code 85).

CTS_WF_ALTERATION_DATE_ONLY_REVIEW.text: Date-field alteration detected on {instrument_id} — routed to human review for bank officer decision.

CTS_WF_PPS_FLAG_D_DUPLICATE.text: PPS flag D on {instrument_id} for {account_display} — duplicate presentation detected. Auto-returned (URRBCH code 14).

CTS_WF_PPS_FLAG_Y_MISMATCH.text: PPS flag Y on {instrument_id} for {account_display} — financial mismatch. Routed to human review.

CTS_WF_PPS_MANDATORY_MISSING.text: No PPS record for {account_display} on {instrument_id} (amount {amount_range}) — above mandatory threshold. Human review required.

CTS_WF_RETURN_CHARGE_EXEMPT.text: Instrument {instrument_id} returned with code {return_reason_code} — bank must NOT levy return charges (non-customer-fault code per URRBCH).

CTS_SMB_SPONSOR_SETTLEMENT_INSUFFICIENT.text: SMB {sub_member_id} settlement funds insufficient at {sponsor_bank_id} — batch of {instrument_count} instruments blocked. URRBCH code 25 applied.

CTS_SMB_SPONSOR_SETTLEMENT_CBS_UNAVAILAB.text: CBS unavailable to verify SMB {sub_member_id} settlement position at {sponsor_bank_id} — batch escalated to human review.
